final_prompt.prompt:

Style/medium: needs a "通透震撼" aesthetic — references in the spirit of Apple product launch keynote visuals, Tesla minimalist automotive photography, contemporary Chinese automotive brand campaign cinematography; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include prominent title placement with supporting subtitle below, clean negative space for brand presence
Subject: must include the automotive launch theme as focal subject
Scene/backdrop: needs an atmospheric, expansive backdrop — exact environment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a luminous, dramatic atmosphere — exact lighting treatment is yours
Color palette: needs a brand-aligned palette — exact color choices are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "长安起源Q06将于9月上市" (title/subtitle distribution is yours)
Constraints: must preserve brand tone appropriateness for automotive sector
Avoid:
